name: SIYI Technology
notes: Shenzhen-based. Major consumer/prosumer drone gimbal brand. ZR10 (10x), ZR30 (30x), A8 (6x). Affordable pricing.

name: Viewpro
notes: Chinese manufacturer and OEM supplier. Wide product range including Q10F (10x) and 30x models. Also supplies CUAV.

name: Topotek
notes: Founded 2012 in China. Specializes in zoom cameras and multi-sensor gimbals. 10x to 90x hybrid zoom range.

name: DJI
notes: World's largest drone manufacturer. Enterprise payloads: Zenmuse H20 (15x), H30 (34x). Gimbals only compatible with DJI drones.

name: Foxtech
notes: Chinese manufacturer. Multiple product lines: EH series, SEEKER series, SYK series. 10x-30x optical zoom.

name: Gremsy
notes: Vietnamese manufacturer. Known for quality gimbals. Zio (20x optical), Vio (20x), Orus L (25x). MAVLink native.

name: Yangda
notes: Chinese manufacturer. Sky Eye series (10x-40x optical zoom), Storm Eye series (30x-40x with thermal/LRF). Also makes VTOL drones.

name: Zingto
notes: Chinese manufacturer. INYYO brand. Q12X (10x), Q350/Q353/Q355 (30x). Dual-sensor options available.

name: Ukrspecsystems
notes: Ukrainian manufacturer. USG-261 (10x, 400g), USG-231 (30x). Also makes PD-1 UAV. Military-focused.

name: Trillium Engineering
notes: Canadian manufacturer. HD25 (12x, <400g), HD45 (20x, 885g). Military/defense focused. Group 1-3 UAS.

name: Edge Autonomy
notes: US manufacturer, formerly Octopus ISR. E95, E140, E180 series. Up to 30x zoom. Military/defense. Non-ITAR options.

name: Controp
notes: Israeli manufacturer. Premium EO/IR gimbals. Primarily military. Likely exceeds $10k price point.

name: CUAV
notes: Chinese manufacturer. Q10F (10x optical, 413g). Uses Viewpro OEM components. Also makes flight controllers.

name: Threod Systems
notes: Estonian manufacturer. Shark gimbal series. Military-focused. Limited public specs.

name: Sky-Drones
notes: UK-based integrator. Sells third-party payloads, does not manufacture gimbals. Platform/software company.

name: Savgood Technology
notes: Chinese OEM. Makes zoom camera modules, not complete drone gimbals. Supplies components to gimbal manufacturers.

name: Digital Eagle
notes: Chinese manufacturer. Makes both drones and zoom camera payloads.

name: Autel Robotics
notes: Chinese/US manufacturer. EVO Max 4T has 10x optical zoom. Gimbals not typically sold separately for third-party drones.
